name: Pin High Golf Suites
address: 2280 Manatt Ct Unit D3, Castle Rock, CO 80104
about: Pin High Golf Suites is a premium indoor golf simulator venue offering 24/7 access to members and punch pass holders. The facility utilizes TrackMan launch monitors and 4k projectors across three bays, featuring two oversized 19ft screens and one private bay, providing a climate-controlled environment for year-round play. Membership options, hourly punch passes, and public tee times are available, designed to accommodate golfers of every skill level with a focus on convenience and high-end technology.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to TrackMan technology and large 19ft screens
Ability to play 18 holes in just 45 minutes
Flexible membership options with punch passes and hourly rates
Climate-controlled, welcoming space for all skill levels
Top-of-the-line PGA Tour used technology in a local setting

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed, complimentary cold water available

simulator_hardware.notes: Same technology used by PGA Tour professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must provide their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drink. Complimentary cold waters are available in the fridge.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring up to 3 guests free of charge.
